user.title: HomeKit Climate Plus
user.description:
Set up a new bridge. Pick a name, a free port for the HomeKit server, and the climate entities to expose.

After creation, Home Assistant will show a persistent notification with the Apple Home setup code.

data_description.name: Shown in Apple Home during pairing.
data_description.port: Any free TCP port. Stock HomeKit Bridge uses 21064; accessory-mode bridges climb from there. A default of 21065 is usually safe.
data_description.pin: Format XXX-XX-XXX. Leave blank to let pyhap generate one; fix it here if you want the PIN to stay the same across restarts.

init.title: Climate entities
init.description: Add or remove climate entities on this bridge. The bridge will reload automatically.
